checkpoint: Source policy and Source Exchange alignment
reference_scope: aMule/eMule source management, DeadSourceList, Source Exchange; MLDonkey source handling; Wireshark source packets
target_behavior: Align server, OBFU, inline, resume, SX1, SX2, SX2 v4, Kad, callback, crypt metadata, source server metadata, queue rank, part availability, dedupe, loopback/self filtering, dead-source backoff, retry, and endgame policy.
verification: cmake --build --preset default --target aria2_tests; build/default/aria2_tests; git diff --check
notes: Source Exchange request opcode selection now follows remote capability truth. SX2 peers receive OP_REQUESTSOURCES2 with the version/options/hash payload; SX1 peers with version greater than 1 receive OP_REQUESTSOURCES with the hash-only payload; unsupported peers receive no SX request. Require-crypt sources are preserved as metadata but skipped by connect scheduling until encrypted transport is implemented.

reference_scope: aMule/eMule Kademlia; MLDonkey Kad; protocol-docs Kad; Kademlia paper
target_behavior: Align classic Kad nodes.dat, bootstrap, hello, routing table, traversal, source search, source publish, keyword search, firewalled checks, direct callback constraints, refresh, transaction expiry, and durable routing state. Prune Kad1 and UI-only behavior.
verification: Focused Kad packet/state checks; local UDP simulation where useful
notes: Keep one existing UDP event-loop path.
